# omada_mdns_reflector (Resource)

Manages an mDNS reflection rule (bridges mDNS/Bonjour discovery between a service VLAN and a client VLAN).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "omada_mdns_reflector" "media" {
  name         = "Media to Main"
  profile_ids  = ["buildIn-1"] # AP profile IDs
  service_vlan = "40"          # where services advertise
  client_vlan  = "10"          # where clients discover
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_vlan` (String) VLAN ID where clients discover the services.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `profile_ids` (List of String) AP profile IDs the reflection applies to (e.g. `buildIn-1`).
- `service_vlan` (String) VLAN ID where services are advertised.

### Optional

- `enable` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `site` (String) Site name. Defaults to the primary site. Changing forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `site_id` (String)
